data.title: A whale deposited 3.38 million USDC to Hyperliquid to purchase HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale address deposited $3.38 million in USDC to Hyperliquid in the past hour to purchase HYPE, and has purchased 116,147 HYPE (worth approximately $2.36 million) so far.

data.title: SEC says ‘Meme Coins Not Securities,’ Pump.Fun Revenue Falls
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has issued a staff statement explicitly declaring that meme coins generally do not qualify as securities under federal law. Released on February 27, 2025, the statement provides clarity for the cryptocurrency sector after years of regulatory uncertainty surrounding token classifications. In its guidance, the SEC clarified that meme […]
The post...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/28/sec-says-meme-coins-not-securities-pump-fun-revenue-falls/

data.title: 5 whale addresses have transferred 3.54 million SOL to Coinbase in the past 12 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 5 whale addresses unstaked 5.52 million SOL (about 810 million US dollars) in the past 12 hours, of which 3.54 million (516 million US dollars) were transferred to Coinbase Prime.

data.title: Solana Now Retesting Realized Price: Will Shift To Bear Market Happen?
data.description:
On-chain data shows Solana is hovering around its Realized Price right now, a level that has historically served as the boundary for major trend shifts. The “Realized Price” refers to an indicator that,...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-retesting-realized-price-shift-bear-market/

data.title: Bitcoin returns to the top ten global asset market capitalization rankings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to 8marketcap monitoring data, Bitcoin has returned to the top ten in the global asset market value ranking. The data shows that the current market value of Bitcoin is approximately 1.694 trillion US dollars, surpassing Meta Platforms (Facebook) to rank 10th in the global asset market value, with a 24-hour increase of 6.80%.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Significant Decline
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.7 billion USDC and redeemed around 4.3 billion USDC in the week ending February 27. This resulted in a net decrease of about 600 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 55.5 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately 55.7 billion USD. Of these reserves, about 5.9 billion USD is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately 49.8 billion USD.

data.title: What is Bitcoin price going to do next? — Bear trap, bottom, or oversold bounce?
data.description:
Crypto traders expect Bitcoin price to remain choppy in the short term as a new range must be established after this week’s double-digit drawdown.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/what-is-bitcoin-price-going-to-do-next-bear-trap-bottom-or-oversold-bounce?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: GT's market value rose to 44th in the global cryptocurrency ranking, with a 24-hour increase of more than 5%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market data, the market value of Gate.io platform currency GT has risen to 44th in the global encryption rankings, and the 24-hour increase has expanded to 5.56%. The current price is US$21.281.

data.title: Trader Makes Significant Bitcoin Purchase Worth $142 Million
data.description: According to Foresight News, on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that a trader with the ID 'Set 10 Big Goals First' executed a significant transaction early today. The trader purchased 1,698 BTC at a price of $83,568.65 per Bitcoin, amounting to a total position value of $142 million.

data.title: A contract trader opened another long position of BTC worth $142 million in the early hours of this morning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a real trader with the id "Set 10 big goals first" went long on 1,698 BTC at $83,568.65 early this morning, with a position value of $142 million.
